/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/formula_widget.dir/formula_widget_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/formula_widget.dir/src/ft_library.cpp.o CMakeFiles/formula_widget.dir/src/ft_font_face.cpp.o CMakeFiles/formula_widget.dir/src/formula_widget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/formula_widget.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o formula_widget -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib mfl/src/libmfl.a /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/libfreetype.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libharfbuzz.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
